title: citrus × aurata var. pomum-adami
intro: Citrus × aurata var. pomum-adami, also known as the pomelo or grapefruit, is a citrus plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The pomelo is rich in flavonoids, limonoids, and furanocoumarins, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Citrus × aurata var. pomum-adami include weight management, improved digestion, and reduced risk of heart disease due to its high content of naringenin and other bioactive compounds. Citrus × aurata var. pomum-adami can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being consumed as a fresh fruit or juice.
